docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Installation Guide
docs.text: We recommend using a virtual environment (Conda or venv) to ensure reproducible results.

docs.title: Step-by-Step Setup
docs.text:
1. Clone the repository: git clone https://github.com/your-repo/GENIUS-LLM.git
  2. Create virtual environment: python -m venv venv
  3. Install dependencies: pip install -r requirements.txt

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text: If you cannot access our web portal, you can run a local instance of GENIUS-LLM.

docs.title: Model Compatibility Matrix
docs.text:
As requested, here is the explicit support status for different LLMs:

Model Family API Format Streaming Status GPT-4o OpenAI Yes Fully Supported DeepSeek V3 OpenAI Compatible Yes Fully Supported Claude 3.5 Anthropic Yes Supported via LiteLLM Gemini 1.5 Google No Coming Soon

docs.title: Welcome to GENIUS-LLM
docs.text: GENIUS-LLM is a one-stop gene function inference platform.

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• Multi-omics data integration.
  • Support for various LLMs (GPT-4o, Claude, DeepSeek).
  • High-performance functional genomics boosting.
